articles.title: XRP sentiment hits 2-year high, but why is price stuck?
articles.description: XRP social media sentiment has turned bullish following integration with Rakuten Wallet, but resistance at $1.40 could cap the upside.

articles.title: Price predictions 5/1: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, XMR

articles.title: Gency AI raises $20 million to build a sovereign advertising network powered by AI and blockchain consensus

articles.description: Coatue, one of the biggest names in venture capital, has a new venture that is reportedly buying land near large power sources.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation finalizes sale of 10,000 ether to BitMine as part of its treasury strategy
articles.description: The latest transaction follows a similar March deal in which the foundation sold 5,000 ETH to BitMine, raising roughly $10.2 million.

articles.title: Canadian pension giant AIMCo buys the dip in Strategy, now sitting on $69 million unrealized gain
articles.description: AIMCo returns to Michael Saylor's bitcoin treasury company years after exiting, now sitting on a sizable unrealized gain.

articles.title: A new narrative for bitcoin that will last
articles.description: Of the myriad pundits proclaiming what bitcoin is or isn’t, Blume offers a more clear-eyed framing that, he argues, will outlast the others.

articles.title: Tether posts $1.04 billion Q1 profit, reaches $8.23 billion reserve buffer
articles.description: The stablecoin issuer said the crypto market was highly volatile during the first quarter.

articles.title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
articles.description: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.

articles.description: Crypto markets splinter as miners pivot to AI, BitMine doubles down on ETH, stablecoin liquidity idles, and tokenized Treasurys reshape trading collateral.

articles.title: AI agent forms its own company, gets ready to trade crypto

articles.title: Ubuntu services hit by outages after DDoS attack
articles.description: A group of hacktivists have claimed responsibility for a distributed denial-of-service attack, which has affected several Ubuntu and Canonical websites, and prevented users from updating the Linux-based operating system.

articles.title: Crypto VC funding plunges to $659M in April, hits near two-year low
articles.description: Crypto VC funding fell to $659 million in April, its lowest monthly total since July 2024, as dealmaking slowed across the sector.
